programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: In the village of Ramgarh, retired police chief Thakur Baldev Singh (Sanjeev Kumar) plots to bring down the notorious bandit Gabbar Singh (Amjad Khan) and enlists the help of two lesser criminals, Jai (Amitabh Bachchan) and Veeru (Dharmendra). When Gabbar attacks the village, however, Jai and Veeru wonder why Thakur does nothing to help them. They soon learn that he has no arms, and that Gabbar was the one who cut them off. Enraged by this, they redouble their efforts to help.

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.588
programme.desc: HUR YOUNGJI, Rocket Punch, TEMPEST, cignature, TRENDZ, TAN, W24, X:IN, SEEN HYUN HEE, Song Min Kyung, Girl's world, withus

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.307
programme.desc: FRankly is made up of vocalist and guitarist Jung Seung-Hwan, guitarist Na Hyung-chul, drummer Ato, and bassist Koo Dong-uk. Deeply inspired by the 2000s Brit pop and American alternative rock, their music encapsulates authentic retro sentiments. However, they also display their trademark, youthful energy in many other elements of their musical work, such as album covers and song descriptions, making everyone fall for their kaleidoscopic qualities.In this episode, FRankly performs “TR,” “Grow Up!,” “DD (Drunk Dreaming,” “Help me,” and their latest single “Novel.”

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.308
programme.desc: BAND NAH is comprised of guitarist and vocalist Nah Sang-hyun, drummer Kang Hyun-woong, and bassist PAIIEK. This 88io debuted in 2015 with the EP, “Tingling,” and has released about 90 songs since then. Impressively enough, their music is as diverse as it is prolific. They have been evolving in unpredictable ways every time while maintaining their delightful spirit - no wonder why they are highly sought after for concerts and festivals.In this episode, BAND NAH performs “Shine,” which they released early this year, “Love Love Love,” Spotlight“ featured on the sound88ack of ”Yumi's Cells,“ ”88,“ and ”1+1“ to showcase the essence of their musicality.

programme.title: I'm LIVE Ep.310
programme.desc: Isaac Hong made himself known to the public with his Yoo Jae-ha Music Contest-winning self-written song “Spring” in 2013. Since then, he has steadily built up his own musical world, marked by his trademark, mellow vocals and delicate sentiments. This time, he collaborated with renowned jazz pianist Sooyoung Chin to drop their project album, “Everland.” It is a mostly English-language album made through months of full collaboration, and the two describe it as “a record of their conversations over piano.” Using the common language of music, the two expanded their reach into each other's respective universes. Tune in to I'm LIVE and join their beautiful jazzy conversation!In this episode, Isaac Hong X Sooyoung Chin performs their songs “(n)everland,” “a bird,” “pages,” and also Hong's own pieces “Rain” and “Stay.”Joining us on this week's episode of I'm LIVE is Isaac Hong X Sooyoung Chin!

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Next Africa
programme.desc: A monthly deep dive into Africa's biggest stories through a Bloomberg lens. Global investors see the continent as one of the top areas for opportunity and growth, and some African nations are well-positioned to be global hubs for development. This show will discuss key steps taken to help deliver on Africa's quest of bridging the gap with global powers, and track capital flows and the direction of funds amid the underlying political, economic and social developments.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Former U.K. Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in strongmen.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with USC Annenberg School for Communication and Journalism Dean Willow Bay about her investment in Angel City Football Club and her tenure on NBA Inside Stuff.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly visits the UK's Motorsport Valley, where Williams Team Principal James Volwes and F1 Academy drivers' champion Abbi Pulling show how advanced simulation is shaping the future of Formula 1.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly follows Pierre Gasly from Alpine Headquarters to a Paris photo shoot to get a firsthand look at how the business of being an F1 driver goes far beyond the track.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly heads to Maranello, Italy, to speak with Ferrari's leadership about the coming regulatory changes for Formula 1 and how Ferrari's racing technology informs the road cars of today.

programme.title: Power Players
programme.desc: Jason Kelly joins Miami Grand Prix Managing Partner Tom Garfinkel as he tackles the complexities of putting on the race and F1 CEO Stefano Domenicali reveals why it is key to F1's future growth.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj travels the world to meet people transforming waste into resources showing that waste isn't something to hide -- it's something we can rethink as valuable raw material.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: As the world faces climate challenges, imaginative individuals are leading the way toward solutions.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Do Chutki Sindoor
programme.desc: Vinayak and Siddhi live in Agra and Siddhi has a sister named Maya, who has a mental capacity of a 9-year-old. Siddhi takes full responsibility of Maya and ensures she is never left alone. Sunaina, their stepmother worries about Maya. Siddhi assures Sunaina that she will not marry until she finds someone who will take care of Maya. On the other hand, Vinayak who is the only son of rich and famous Jayadevi, a shrewd woman who despises the colour black. Vinayak and Siddhi's paths cross when Maya is about to get hit by Vinayak's car. Siddhi intervenes and saves Maya, but in anger slaps Vinayak for calling Maya "Pagal" (crazy). Vinayak realizes that he has fallen for Siddhi and promises to take care of Maya and marries Siddhi to seek revenge and make Maya suffer.

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.desc: The Try Guys stay up for 36 hours straight and try to drive a difficult closed traffic course to experience the (totally legal) hazards of sleepy driving. #TryGuysDUI

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: We tried to paint our staff like french girls and WOW was this a ride! 👨‍🎨🎨 How do you think our art turned out?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: All of the toys featured in this video were donated to Toys For Tots! 🧸❤️Are we an #Unboxing channel now? Watch us live out our life long dream of playing with baby dolls for hours on end! 👶🍼#ToysReview #2019Toys

programme.title: Without a Recipe
programme.desc: Who's ready for some bonus baking? Which Try Guy's Waffle Cone will stack up to the competition?

programme.title: Without a Recipe
programme.desc: Four inexperienced bakers. No recipes. One goal: try to bake a perfect holiday pie.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: It's about to get a little rough down under! We're trying rugby! Watch us attempt to beat a bunch of 12 year olds at their own game in the season finale of Try Australia!

programme.title: Without a Recipe
programme.desc: We don't want none unless you got buns! Join us in the kitchen for chaos and cooking.

programme.title: Try Guys 4vs1
programme.desc: Watch us attempt to beat a professional bowler at her own game.

programme.title: Try Guys 4vs1
programme.desc: In this very special episode we're taking on a PUZZLE CHAMP in a race to the finish line!

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The Try Guys ho ho ho it up for the holidays and try on Christmas costumes, including Santa, Mrs. Claus, a elf and much more.

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: Will the guys be able to make it through 400 piping hot soup dumplings? Don't try this at home!

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: This is probably the most challenging video we've ever shot. Not because the content was hard to capture or shoot, but because it was impossible for us to whisper for an entire video! Did we give you tingles, or did we ruin ASMR forever?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The guys swap dogs to puppy sit for day. Who would you trust to watch your pup?

programme.title: The Try Guys
programme.desc: The guys wear women's pants for 72 hours to experience what it's like to live life without pockets. And our old pal Safiya Nygaard joins us to explain the secret history of pockets in women's fashion.

programme.title: Without a Recipe
programme.desc: Get ready to get stuffed! Today we're trying to make our very own hot sausage links without a recipe! Who's brats will be the best and who's will be the wurst?

programme.title: photo bomber

Jane disguises herself as Santa and gives Jerry gifts, but he is more interested in playing with the Santa cap. Jerry eventually dresses as Santa, and they _hinage in a playful exchange of gifts. programme.title: Invention Story S02 EP 21
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 11
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Armor Monster Ep 01
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates

programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Family Table
programme.desc: A family food game show wherein 2 families compete against each other by preparing their legacy dish. This is followed by celebrity guests presenting their own legacy dish, and challenging both the families to recreate the dish. The family which makes the best version wins an opportunity to dine with the celebrity guest, and celebrity chef Ranveer Brar.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdatta Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded
programme.desc: This series will go back through the record to explore life-altering, earth-shattering, unforgettable events using a combination of carefully selected archive, cutting edge CGI and informative scripting in this popular science format. programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Canada's weather is complex and powerful! Mark and fellow storm hunters chase down avalanches in British Columbia's back country, twisters in Saskatchewan, and hurricane scale storms in Newfoundland. Enduring extreme weather is just an ordinary day for the True North Strong.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Adventurer George Kourounis' patience is tested as he encounters deadly wildlife and challenging elements while preparing to descend into Marum Volcano in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. Deep in the earth, only 300 feet from a pocket of molten magma, is an amazing chamber filled with giant blue and pink crystals some as big as 60 feet long! It is an extraordinary find and one that is very difficult to witness, as temperatures run to 150 F, with 100% humidity. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews Angry Planet plans to be one of the first in!

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In June of next year we plan to intercept the Monsoon as it hits southern India and makes its way north along the western shore past Goa and Mumbai up to Delhi.This most famous of torrential rainy seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water on parts of the parched sub-continent.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canadas West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode well witness Georges explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Heres the deal: Mt.Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Heres the first kicker:High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave a cave created by the most unique form of erosion Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with thir tusks in order to eat the salty rock.Heres the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus the worlds most deadly virus.So heres the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahus North Shore, and filming George surfing with the Hawaian Fire firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo, site of major Tsunami damage in both 1946 and 1964. We also have filmed extensively at Kilawea Volcano, filming the amazing sight of rivers and waterfalls of red hot lava flowing into the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: It is time for Angry Planet to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous Ships of the Desert. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: The Wizard of Whatever: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: Gusto TV's Wizard of Whatever, Chef Kyle Crawford, is dishing up a holiday feast! There'll be food, fun, elves… and even jolly old St. Nick himself may make an appearance! Join in as Kyle cooks up a Christmas goose complete with stuffing and gravy, plus all the sides and salads, and even a flashy flambé dessert! Merry whatever!

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is right around the corner and it calls for a little fun - like a twist on traditional holiday desserts! FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: TWISTS ON THE CLASSICS offers a new take on some of your favourites to bring you a fresh perspective and world of flavour for the holidays! Enchanting host Jessica McGovern plays off classic desserts, serving up handy hints on how to get the most out of every bite. From sweet and fluffy Gumdrop Cakes drizzled with a light lemony glaze to a delectable Eggnog Ski Slope Cake decorated with rosemary trees and a few friends to hit the hills, Jessica's unique holiday recipes will surly make it on your list of Christmas traditions!

programme.title: One World Kitchen: Our Favourite Holiday Recipes
programme.desc: In this special holiday episode of One World Kitchen, Hana (Japan), Vanessa (Italy), Natalia (Argentina), and Pailin (Thailand) get together to cook their favorite traditional holiday dishes influenced by their respective cultures. Christmas Sushi Rolls, Veal in a Creamy Tuna Sauce with Capers, Striped Bass in Garlic and Lime Marinade, and an epic Timballo. For the final recipe, our hosts combine all the flavors of One World Kitchen into a truly internationally-inspired turkey dish. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes. Michael invites us to the set of his series "Bonacini's Italy" to cook up traditional Italian fare like Salt Cod Mousse on Polenta Crostini and Pork Braised in Milk. Michael takes us on a holiday culinary journey as he explores homey Christmas flavours and traditions, offering tips for perfecting dishes from the regions of Veneto, Sardinia, Calabria, Sicily, and Emilia Romagna.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Spencer's Big Holiday
programme.desc: No matter how you celebrate the holidays, let Spencer Watts help you plan the menu, in SPENCER'S BIG HOLIDAY! In this festive one-hour holiday special, Spencer Watts is serving up some of his favourite holiday meals, treats, and drinks. Follow Spencer as he shows us how to sail through the hectic holiday season with style, from brunch to the moment the clock strikes midnight.

programme.title: One BIG Holiday Recipe
programme.desc: One BIG Recipe is all about cooking for family and friends and so are the holidays! Check out cool chef Kimberly Lallouz's take on holiday favourites in this special seasonal episode. Her first course is a Moroccan spiced Beet Latke with lightly dressed greens and creme fraiche. Next, whole fennel is braised tender, gratineed and spiked with apple chutney. Entrees include a one-of-a-king Turkey Breast 'Buche de Noel' roulade and a juicy, beefy espresso-red wine spiked Brisket roast. Along with her main course come her unique, single-serving Stuffin' muffins, two sauces, sugar snap peas and watermelon radishes. And don't leave without her sweet hostess gifts, White Chocolate Brittle-Bark and perfect Sugar Cookies. Happy Merry to all!

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is near, and the pressure is on! Between work, home, friends, and family, the list of people to buy for is endless. To help us through this busy time, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: EDIBLE GIFTS offers up four creative and more personal options to make the holidays cheaper, sweeter, and filled with love. Fun host Jessica McGovern shows us how to bake something for everyone including Crispy Brittle Bark covered in chocolate, rich Coal Cookies that are sweet with a bit of heat, adorable peanut butter-chocolate Reindeer Cupcakes, and easy-to-make Christmas Puzzle Cookies.

They represent the multi-ethnic past and present of the nation.

Jack used to travel a lot for work and was forced to eat out often so now he really enjoys cooking at home for Beth and for his 2 teenage children (they live with them part time). Beth doesn't do the cooking but likes to sit act as sous chef or watch Jack prepare the meal while she sips wine (she LOVES wine). programme.desc: Mother Nature along the Mother Road. Check out these can't miss natural wonders on Route 66.

programme.title: Destination Route 66
programme.desc: Rest your head after a long day driving Route 66. Check in to these great accommodations along the way!

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family checks out Birmingham, Alabama, ground zero of the Civil Rights Movement, visiting museums, monuments, and locations that helped end segregation in the United States.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family ventures to the Big Easy, soaking up the culture of New Orleans with jazz, beignets, airboat adventures, and more.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family road trips to the Grand Canyon and Zion National Park in search of some outdoor fun.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation
programme.desc: The Ellis Family explores Washington D.C., discovering monuments, Ford's Theatre, and the best cupcakes in the capital!
